title: rosa afzeliana var. glandulifera
intro: Rosa afzeliana var. glandulifera, also known as the glandular rose, is a type of fragrant, flowering shrub native to tropical Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa afzeliana var. glandulifera include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
